lessons: COVERAGE (MAJOR): added the up-to-10-year entitlement window for active reservists (and discharged lone soldiers, whose full rights live in israeli-lone-soldier-rights). The skill previously stated a flat 5-year window everywhere; hachvana extends it to 10 years for a discharged soldier doing active reserve duty (post-Oct-2023).

COVERAGE (MAJOR): added the Mimadim scholarship window extensions the skill's own domain-checklist had flagged unverified: base 5 years, +1 for a mechina, +2 for a year+ of keva service, +3 combined, up to 8 years.

CONSISTENCY FIX: the HE Gotcha cited a stale April-2026 pikadon rate (993.46) while the EN body and script used the correct May-2026 rate (990.63). Fixed the HE body and purged the April rate set (993.46/827.89/662.31) from evidence.json, which was carrying both April and May sets.

EVIDENCE HYGIENE: refreshed the expired Mimadim registration deadline (31.08.2025) to the current תשפ"ו cycle (registration 31.07.2026, upload 31.08.2026); the body correctly does not hardcode a deadline.

CONFIRMED CURRENT 2026 (research): all 6 pikadon tiers (990.63/825.52/660.42/660.42/495.38/330.25) + 5 grant tiers, training reclassification (4 combat / 2 support months down-tiered), caps 32M/24F, 14-day/60-day timelines, 6 permitted purposes, credit point 242/§39a, Tikkun 25 100% tuition. discharge-pikadon checker: no regeneration needed.
Deferred (MINOR): add the 85/15 Mimadim disbursement note; add the Grant.aspx deep link to Reference Links.

cycles.summary: Refreshed Pikadon monthly rates to current hachvana.mod.gov.il values (combat 978.34 to 993.46, support 815.28 to 827.89, rear 652.23 to 662.31) and FIXED the female accrual cap from 28 to 24 months (a structural error; the law caps women at 24 paid service months, matching mandatory service length).
lessons: Pikadon rates are CPI-indexed and drift monthly; the skill correctly caveats this and routes to the official calculator, but the stated anchor values must still be refreshed.

The female accrual cap (24, not 28) is a structural fact, not drift; the wrong value over-credited any woman who served more than 24 months. Surfaced by a fresh-eyes audit of the discharge-pikadon checker tool.
